name: Swamp Green Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the orange quarters in a blender or food processor.
2. In a saucepan, combine 1/4 cup sugar and water. Boil over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add the chopped orange to the saucepan and cook for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and let cool.
5. In a large bowl, sift together the remaining sugar, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. In another bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, oil, and cooled orange mixture.
7. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined; do not overmix.
8. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan or 6-cup mold.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake at 325°F (165°C) for about 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool on a wire rack before wrapping tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerating overnight.
Note: Some variations include adding chopped cranberries to the batter and using a muffin tin instead of a loaf pan.
